events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Many cars driving on the road.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 9.7s, many cars driving on the road.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white car that was turning hit a motorcycle. The motorcycle was smashed and the owner of the motorcycle was hit and flew onto the road.
events.event_text: From 3.0s to 10.0s, the white car that was turning hit a motorcycle. The motorcycle was smashed and the owner of the motorcycle was hit and flew onto the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Many people walked towards the place where the motorcycle owner fell on the sidewalk. Many vehicles are driving on the roadside.
events.event_text: From 9.7s to 65.0s, many people walked towards the place where the motorcycle owner fell on the sidewalk. Many vehicles are driving on the roadside.
